mapper.select: SELECT i.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_cis.code_label AS claim_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_claim_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cis ON cd_cis.code_grp = 'CLAIM_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_cis.code_value = i.claim_item_status_cd WHERE i.claim_item_id = #{id}

SELECT i.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_cis.code_label AS claim_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_claim_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cis ON cd_cis.code_grp = 'CLAIM_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_cis.code_value = i.claim_item_status_cd
ORDER BY i.claim_item_id ASC ORDER BY i.claim_item_id DESC ORDER BY i.prod_nm ASC ORDER BY i.prod_nm DESC ORDER BY i.reg_date ASC ORDER BY i.reg_date DESC ORDER BY i.reg_date DESC
